chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 125 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.571/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 13.02.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner has filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to appoint her on the basis of deceased quota as per scheme of Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974, in accordance with law. Learned AAG Sindh, at the very outset, submits that the very rule is not applicable in the case of petitioner as her husband was a public servant employed in Union Council-20, Sadhuja. Faced with this situation, learned Counsel submits that he would be satisfied if this petition is disposed of by directing the respondents to consider the case of petitioner on humanitarian basis. This request appears to be reasonable, and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. Respondents may consider the case of petitioner for appointment on humanitarian ground. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
